description: Satellite imagery of Bismil, Turkey, acquired on 2013-07-13 by SPOT-5 at 2.5m resolution. The image uses a false colour infrared (1/2/3 Band Combination, typically Green, Red, Near-Infrared) where healthy vegetation appears in shades of red. Key features include a wide, dark river flowing vertically along the right side of the image. The landscape on both sides of the river consists of vibrant red areas, indicating dense vegetation or forests, interspersed with lighter red/pink rectangular plots, characteristic of agricultural fields. A prominent, light blue linear feature runs vertically through the left half of the image, representing a road, consistent with the document's classification of "fast transit roads" (Category 1.2.1). An irregularly shaped dark body of water, likely a small lake or pond, is visible on the far left. The source of the imagery is CNES 2013©, distributed by Airbus DS/Spot Image.
